name: messi-career-vault
description: A lightweight Messi career and media tracker with account-based progress.

scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler d1 execute messi-career-vault --local --file=./schema.sql && wrangler dev
scripts.build: npm run trophies:check && vite build && node scripts/generate-articles.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run videos:check && npm run build && wrangler deploy && node scripts/sync-readwise.mjs
